title: helianthus campestris
intro: Helianthus campestris, also known as the common sunflower, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helianthus campestris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
